g.text: Authentication · Patient Context Sync · Navigation · Role-based Module Loader
Webpack Module Federation Host · Session Management · JWT Interceptor
Port 5000 · Single entry point for all /api/* traffic
patients · vitals · labs · medications · visits · care-team · modules
Frontend: Shell 4200 · Demographics 4201 · Vitals 4202 · Labs 4203 · Medications 4204 · Visits 4205 · Care Team 4206 · Procedures 4207
Backend: API Gateway 5000 · Auth 5001 · Patient 5002 · Vitals 5003 · Labs 5004 · Medications 5005 · Visits 5006 · Care Team 5007 · Registry 5100 · MongoDB 27017

svg.text: 🤖 Phase 8: AI Multi-Agent Layer — v2 Roadmap
New /api/ai/* routes added to existing API Gateway · AI services are peer microservices in the same stack · No changes to existing services
Assembles full patient context · Calls Patient, Vitals, Labs, Medications, Visits services
Delegates to specialized agents · Aggregates all recommendations into one response
LLM tool-calling loop · each tool resolves to an existing domain service API endpoint
⚕️ All recommendations require physician review and explicit approval before any action is taken — Human-in-the-Loop mandatory
Domain services publish on data change: vitals-recorded · labs-resulted · medication-changed · visit-completed
Subscribes to all domain events · Evaluates configurable notification rules
Generates contextual messages for care team and patient
Escalation thresholds reviewed and approved by clinicians · Operates independently of Orchestrator
Critical value → immediate alert · Routine change → daily digest · All actions logged for HIPAA audit
